description: NLP classification, context building, model routing, and inference agents

userStories.title: .1: NLP Classifier Agent
userStories.description: As the system, I need to detect @Project mentions in user messages so that I can inject project context.
acceptanceCriteria: Query `projects` table to validate mentioned projects exist
Return array of `{ projectId, projectName, startIndex, endIndex }`
Write unit tests with 20+ test cases
Invalid project names return empty array (no error)
Latency <50ms for messages up to 1000 chars
userStories.notes: Completed on 2026-01-23. All 21 tests passing. Linting fixed with proper type casting and eslint config updates for test files.

userStories.title: .2: Context Builder Agent
userStories.description: As the system, I need to assemble ranked context from thread history and project memory so that the AI has relevant information.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch project memory if thread attached to project
Fetch project memory if @mentioned (even if not attached)
Truncate context to 8000 tokens (estimate: 4 chars = 1 token)
Return context with metadata (sources, token count)
Write unit tests for ranking logic
Context includes thread history + relevant memories
Ranking function prioritizes project memory over profile memory
Build time <200ms for threads with 1000 messages
userStories.notes: Completed on 2026-01-23. All tests passing. Context builder implements memory ranking, token truncation, and handles project + pinned memories correctly.

userStories.title: .3: Model Router Factory (Dynamic Agent Pattern)
userStories.description: As the system, I need to select the optimal AI model and return a configured `LanguageModel` instance for Dynamic Agent creation.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement `selectModel` factory function (not action, pure function)
Import and configure language models from AI SDK:
Adjust for long context (>6000 tokens → Claude)
Write unit tests for all mode combinations
Model selection is deterministic given same inputs
Compatible with Convex Dynamic Agent API
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-01-23. All tests passing. Model selection working correctly for all modes.

userStories.title: .4: Main Inference Agent (Dynamic Agent)
userStories.description: As the system, I need to create a Dynamic Agent that generates AI responses using the selected model with assembled context and project-specific tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Run agent with context + user message
Add error handling (context build failure → fallback to thread-only)
Measure end-to-end latency (target <2s for full pipeline)
@Mention in message triggers project memory injection
Dynamic Agent uses correct model per mode
Agent can use tools to search memories/context
Context snapshot stored in message metadata
Pipeline failure does not crash message send
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-01-23. All 52 tests passing. Main Inference Agent implemented with full pipeline orchestration.

userStories.title: .1: UX State Agent
userStories.description: As the system, I need to determine when to show attachment banners and manage UI state.
acceptanceCriteria: Check if thread already attached to mentioned project (no banner)
Check if banner already dismissed for this mention (no banner)
Handle multiple @mentions (show banner for first unattached project)
Write unit tests for all edge cases
Edge cases handled correctly (see spec.md EC-1 to EC-6)
